content.problemStatement:
There are three **distinct** points - A,B,CA, B, CA,B,C in the XÔłĺYX-YXÔłĺY plane. Initially, you are located at point AAA. You want to reach the point CCC satisfying the following conditions:


You have to go through point B.
You can move in any of the four axis-parallel directions (+X+X+X, ÔłĺX-XÔłĺX, +Y+Y+Y, ÔłĺY-YÔłĺY direction). However, you can make **at most** one turn in the path from AAA to CCC.
Determine if it is possible to reach the destination CCC satisfying the above conditions.

**NOTE**:


One turn means 90Ôłś90 ^ \circ90Ôłś  clockwise or anticlockwise rotation along the direction of movement. For example, if you are moving towards the +X+X+X direction, after one turn you can move either in the +Y+Y+Y direction or in the ÔłĺY-YÔłĺY direction. **Changing the direction by 180Ôłś180 ^ \circ180Ôłś is not allowed**.

Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers XA,YAX_A, Y_AXAÔÇő,YAÔÇő, denoting the coordinates of the starting point AAA.
The second line of each test case contains two space-separated integers XB,YBX_B, Y_BXBÔÇő,YBÔÇő, denoting the coordinates of the point BBB.
The third line of each test case contains two space-separated integers XC,YCX_C, Y_CXCÔÇő,YCÔÇő, denoting the coordinates of the finishing point CCC.


Output Format
For each test case, print a single line containing one string - `"YES"`(without quotes) if it is possible to reach the finishing point satisfying the above conditions, otherwise print `"NO"`(without quotes).
constraints: Ôłĺ109ÔëĄXA,YA,XB,YB,XC,YCÔëĄ109-10^9 \leq X_A, Y_A, X_B, Y_B, X_C, Y_C \leq 10^9Ôłĺ109ÔëĄXAÔÇő,YAÔÇő,XBÔÇő,YBÔÇő,XCÔÇő,YCÔÇőÔëĄ109

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111:  You start moving in the +Y+Y+Y direction from A=(1,1)A = (1, 1)A=(1,1), after two-unit steps you reach the point B=(1,3)B = (1, 3)B=(1,3). Then you make a clockwise turn at point BBB and start moving towards the +X+X+X direction. After two-unit steps, you reach the finishing point C=(3,3)C = (3, 3)C=(3,3).


Test case 222:  There is no possible way to reach the finishing point CCC satisfying the above conditions. You have to make at least two turns in the path.


Test case 333:  You start moving in the ÔłĺX-XÔłĺX direction from A=(5,2)A = (5, 2)A=(5,2) . After 4 unit steps, you reach the finish point C=(1,2)C = (1, 2)C=(1,2). In the path from AAA to CCC, you go through the point B=(3,2)B = (3,2)B=(3,2) and don't make any turn.
